title: Mellowed
description: Mellowed aims to stay as loyal as possible to vanilla textures while overhauling the game for a softer, cozier, and dare I say more mellow cottage core aesthetic.
body:
## Mellowed

<center>

Mellowed is a 16x resource pack that aims to stay as loyal as possible to the vanilla textures while overhauling the game for a softer, cozier, and dare I say more mellow aesthetic.  ‎
‎  ‎  
‎  ‎  
![Description Separator, Grass Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00acd87fad46cd3ce60cfe08b75e662b3dfa8c4e.png)
Do you enjoy the color palette and aesthetic of cottagecore packs like Mizuno's or Kova but don't like that your vanilla builds may look different?  
Do you want the relaxing desaturated tones and smooth photos like your favorite shader pack but don't want to take the FPS hit?  
  
**Then this pack was made just for you!**
![Description Separator, Stone Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H7gYHOeg/images/62e085e170897ab788557952208cc92e7c5d4102.png)

<u>

### My Process

</u>


Mellowed seeks to work within the bounds of vanilla Minecraft, instead of drawing something from a blank canvas textures have been carefully tweaked. The hues and contrast of textures have been changed to create something unique yet familiar.
My goal is to take the softening of textures from 1.13 to the next level, and make greater changes only when necessary.  

You can think of this as the "Ship of Theseus" of Resource Packs.


![Description Separator, Oak Logs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bcd569f945a01fde6051b23d2e4c8b68d3f87ed.png) 

<u>

### Here Be Dragons

</u>

This project is still in very early Beta, only a small percentage of textures have currently been tweaked and these early beta versions exist primarily as a way to gather feedback from all of you who give it a shot and download anyway.  
While in beta, this project will receive many regular updates so be sure to **follow** it by clicking the little **heart button** here on Modrinth!  
If you like the pack and want to let me know or have any other feedback or questions [join my Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/qxRVkGDjdJ)!


![Description Separator, Sand Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H7gYHOeg/images/a2b4c14502cc6116c4c252e84cb4c4d95594aff6.png)  


[**Check out the Slider for yourself!**](https://imgsli.com/Mjk4OTQ2)

</center>

![A comparison between Vanilla and Mellowed Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H7gYHOeg/images/c5e1b2577ad35f848d9f6847fa9daf23f954a9a5.png)
